prestazioni: Engine: Skyactiv-G 2.5T (PY-VPTS) – Full bolt-on turbo upgrade with Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbocharger (84 trim, 0.63 A/R turbine housing) paired with a custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe (Cobb Tuning) and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for precise 24 psi peak pressure targeting.

Fuel System: Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors (1050cc/min) with a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup (PN 20-0119) and a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump (PN F90000267) to support E85 blends up to 50%.

Suspension & Handling: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (CX-5 specific valving, 8kg/mm front / 7kg/mm rear springs) with Whiteline 27mm front and 24mm rear adjustable sway bars (PN BMR95X & BMR108) and poly bushings (SuperPro SPF0115K).
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny V2 widebody kit (CX-5 specific, carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and overfenders) with a custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap (2080 series) and blacked-out OEM badges (PlastiDip).
Wheels: Work Emotion CR Kiwami 20x9.5 +25 front / 20x10.5 +30 rear (matte bronze finish) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/40/20 front, 275/35/20 rear).

Interior: Recaro Sportster CS-II front seats (CX-5 specific mounts) with Schroth Profi II 4-point harnesses, a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede), and a custom carbon fiber shift knob (Seibon, SK-CX5-TURBO).
